lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਾ ਨੋ ਦੇਇ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਥਿਰੁ ਘਰੀ ਬਹਾਲਿਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: har bhagataa no dee anand thir gharee bahaalian |
lines.english: The Lord bestows bliss upon His devotees, and gives them a seat in the eternal home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪੀਆ ਨੋ ਨ ਦੇਈ ਥਿਰੁ ਰਹਣਿ ਚੁਣਿ ਨਰਕ ਘੋਰਿ ਚਾਲਿਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: paapeea no na deee thir rehan chun narak ghor chaalian |
lines.english: He does not give the sinners any stability or place of rest; He consigns them to the depths of hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਾ ਨੋ ਦੇਇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਅੰਗੁ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਿਅਨੁ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: har bhagataa no dee piaar kar ang nisataarian |19|
lines.english: The Lord blesses His devotees with His Love; He sides with them and saves them. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਬੁਧਿ ਡੂਮਣੀ ਕੁਦਇਆ ਕਸਾਇਣਿ ਪਰ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਘਟ ਚੂਹੜੀ ਮੁਠੀ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਚੰਡਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: kubudh ddoomanee kudeaa kasaaein par nindaa ghatt chooharree mutthee krodh chanddaal |
lines.english: False-mindedness is the drummer-woman; cruelty is the butcheress; slander of others in one's heart is the cleaning-woman, and deceitful anger is the outcast-woman.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਕਾਰਾਂ ਨਾਵਣੁ ਨਾਉ ਜਪੇਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: sach sanjam karanee kaaraan naavan naau japehee |
lines.english: Make Truth your self-discipline, and make good deeds the lines you draw; make chanting the Name your cleansing bath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰੀ ਕਢੀ ਕਿਆ ਥੀਐ ਜਾਂ ਚਾਰੇ ਬੈਠੀਆ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: kaaree kadtee kiaa theeai jaan chaare baittheea naal |
lines.english: What good are the ceremonial lines drawn around your kitchen, when these four are seated there with you?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਗੈ ਊਤਮ ਸੇਈ ਜਿ ਪਾਪਾਂ ਪੰਦਿ ਨ ਦੇਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak agai aootam seee ji paapaan pand na dehee |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who do not walk in the ways of sin, shall be exalted in the world hereafter. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਹੰਸੁ ਕਿਆ ਬਗੁਲਾ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa hans kiaa bagulaa jaa kau nadar karee |
lines.english: Which is the swan, and which is the crane? It is only by His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰਜੁ ਦੇਇ ਸਵਾਰਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਖੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: kaaraj dee savaar satigur sach saakheeai |
lines.english: He will resolve your affairs; the True Guru gives His Guarantee of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਲੋੜੀਐ ਕੰਮੁ ਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਹਿ ਆਖੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: keetaa lorreeai kam su har peh aakheeai |
lines.english: Whatever work you wish to accomplish-tell it to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਕਾਗਹੁ ਹੰਸੁ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai naanakaa kaagahu hans karee |2|
lines.english: Whoever is pleasing to Him, O Nanak, is transformed from a crow into a swan. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭੰਜਨ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨ ਦਾਸ ਕੀ ਰਾਖੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bhanjan miharavaan daas kee raakheeai |
lines.english: The Lord is the Merciful Destroyer of fear; He preserves and protects His slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਚਾਖੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: santaa sang nidhaan amrit chaakheeai |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, you shall taste the treasure of the Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਅਲਖੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਲਾਖੀਐ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak har gun gaae alakh prabh laakheeai |20|
lines.english: O Nanak, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and see the Unseen Lord God. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਭਸੈ ਦੇਇ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh tis kaa sabhasai dee adhaar |
lines.english: Body and soul, all belong to Him. He gives His Support to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਜਿਨਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hau balihaaree tin kau jin dhiaaeaa har nirankaar |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who meditate on the Formless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh seveeai sadaa sadaa daataar |
lines.english: O Nanak, become Gurmukh and serve Him, who is forever and ever the Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਕੇ ਮੁਖ ਸਦ ਉਜਲੇ ਓਨਾ ਨੋ ਸਭੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਕਰੇ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: onaa ke mukh sad ujale onaa no sabh jagat kare namasakaar |1|
lines.english: Their faces are forever radiant, and the whole world bows in reverence to them. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਾਰਹ ਸਿਧੀ ਪਿਛੈ ਲਗੀਆ ਫਿਰਨਿ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਨਿਜ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: atthaarah sidhee pichhai lageea firan nij ghar vasai nij thaae |
lines.english: The Siddhis-the eighteen supernatural spiritual powers-follow in my footsteps; I dwell in my own home, within my own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਉਲਟੀ ਭਈ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਖਰਚਿਉ ਖਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai ulattee bhee nav nidh kharachiau khaau |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, I am totally transformed; I have obtained the nine treasures to use and consume.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਦ ਧੁਨੀ ਸਦ ਵਜਦੇ ਉਨਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anahad dhunee sad vajade unaman har liv laae |
lines.english: The Unstruck Melody constantly vibrates within; my mind is exalted and uplifted-I am lovingly absorbed in the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਤਿਨਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਜਿਨ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak har bhagat tinaa kai man vasai jin masatak likhiaa dhur paae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, devotion to the Lord abides within the minds of those who have such pre-ordained destiny written on their foreheads. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਢਾਢੀ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਦਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau dtaadtee har prabh khasam kaa har kai dar aaeaa |
lines.english: I am a minstrel of the Lord God, my Lord and Master; I have come to the Lord's Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪੁਛਿਆ ਢਾਢੀ ਸਦਿ ਕੈ ਕਿਤੁ ਅਰਥਿ ਤੂੰ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har puchhiaa dtaadtee sad kai kit arath toon aaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord called His minstrel in, and asked, "Why have you come here?"

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸੁਣੀ ਪੂਕਾਰ ਢਾਢੀ ਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har andar sunee pookaar dtaadtee mukh laaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord has heard my sad cries from within; He has called me, His minstrel, into His Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਦਇਆਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nit devahu daan deaal prabh har naam dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: "O Merciful God, please grant me the gift of continual meditation on the Lord's Name."

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਾਤੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪੈਨਾਇਆ ॥੨੧॥੧॥ ਸੁਧੁ
lines.translit: har daatai har naam japaaeaa naanak painaaeaa |21|1| sudh
lines.english: And so the Lord, the Great Giver, inspired Nanak to chant the Lord's Name, and blessed him with robes of honor. ||21||1||Sudh||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕਾ ॥ ਏਕੁ ਸੁਆਨੁ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਗਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag kabeer jeeo kaa | ek suaan kai ghar gaavanaa |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Kabeer Jee: To Be Sung To The Tune Of "Ayk Su-Aan" :

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਰ ਮੋਰ ਕਰਿ ਅਧਿਕ ਲਾਡੁ ਧਰਿ ਪੇਖਤ ਹੀ ਜਮਰਾਉ ਹਸੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mor mor kar adhik laadd dhar pekhat hee jamaraau hasai |1|
lines.english: Calling him, "Mine, mine", she fondles him lovingly, while the Messenger of Death looks on and laughs. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਨੀ ਜਾਨਤ ਸੁਤੁ ਬਡਾ ਹੋਤੁ ਹੈ ਇਤਨਾ ਕੁ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਜਿ ਦਿਨ ਦਿਨ ਅਵਧ ਘਟਤੁ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: jananee jaanat sut baddaa hot hai itanaa ku na jaanai ji din din avadh ghattat hai |
lines.english: The mother thinks that her son is growing up; she does not understand that, day by day, his life is diminishing.
